Precision Measurement Equipment & Services
High Quality Measuring Products and Services Supported by our UKAS Laboratory
The Complete Measurement Solution
Eley Metrology designs and manufactures high-quality precision measuring equipment
For over 50 years, we have been at the heart of metrology in the UK and pride ourselves on the high quality and longevity of our products.
With products ranging from small metrology tooling items to full coordinate measuring machine services and CMM inspection, we have all your company's measurement needs covered. Our products are designed and produced to the highest manufacturing quality level and are supported by our UKAS Laboratory (no. 30213).
Eley Metrology caters for industries such as aerospace, automotive, oil and gas and appliance making. Our clients range from large manufacturing companies to inspection laboratories for quality control.
We are also the exclusive UK distributor of the DeMeet range of non-contact optical measuring machines.
The is the all-encompassing measurement solution for you and your company
Custom Made Precision Measurement Solutions
If you need a specialist bespoke item developing and building, our team is here to help. We are able to adapt many of our existing range of products to suit specific requirements. Alternatively, we can assist you in the design and development of a completely bespoke product.
Contact our sales team
to find out more.
Digital Height Gauges
The Vertex VMS (Vertical Measuring System) is a key part of our impressive product range, providing a unique solution in the field of Digital Height Gauges.
Find Out More
Granite Surface Tables & Plates
With over 100 years of experience our expertise is world-leading. By purchasing from Eley Metrology, you are choosing the very best for your business.
Find Out More
Long Bore CMM
The Long Bore CMM provides a solution to one of the great challenges in Metrology; that of offering precision measurement down long/deep bores.
Find Out More

About Our Business | Eley Metrology

Accept

Home
About Us
For over 50 years
, Eley Metrology has been at the heart of the design and manufacture of
high-quality metrology equipment
and
precision measurement
. A comprehensive product line allows for a complete solution to your measurement problems. Our services are covered by our skilled and friendly engineers, who are always on hand to help ensure you have a fantastic experience with us and are supported by our after-sales and technical teams.
With products ranging from small
metrology tooling items
to full
coordinate measuring machine
services and
CMM inspection
, we have your company's measurement needs covered. Our products are designed and produced to the highest manufacturing quality level and are supported by our UKAS Laboratory (no. 30213).
Eley Metrology caters for industries such as aerospace, automotive, oil and gas and appliance making. Our clients range from large manufacturing companies to inspection laboratories for quality control.
Our History
Eley's History is that of an industry leader. Founded in 1976; Eley Metrology has and continues to be at the forefront of Metrology. As the worldwide demand for metrology solutions increases, Eley has evolved to lead the field with quality and accurate, Bespoke & Special Purpose
Precision Measuring Equipment
In the words of our founder and Managing Director Jeff Eley;
"It began with an ambition and a burning desire’ – to design manufacture and create a range of Co-ordinate Measuring Machines along with other allied Metrology products.
Accuracy, performance and quality were like an oxygen that fanned a flame in a quest for the unachievable; perfection and infinity – where the only real satisfaction is the knowledge that this is the best that could be achieved at a point.
With immensely capable and enthusiastic colleagues I have pursued the quest, drawing ever closer to that impossible goal.
In the world of market forces, a compromise is struck between excellence required and ‘how much will it cost?’ Eley’s products must be affordable, they must offer value for money. It is my belief that they do.
I would like you to be as confident as I am that purchasing one of our products will prove to be the right decision. If it is not, I would like to be the first to know.
I promise to make it my prime interest that customer satisfaction is guaranteed."
Jeff’s words certainly ring as true today as they did then.
Eley Metrology's Timeline
1991
Eley Metrology became the first United Kingdom UKAS Laboratory to gain accreditation to ISO 10360.
The backing of the UKAS Laboratory at Eley Metrology has enabled us to offer the latest standards of excellence, quality calibration and traceability.
2002
Eley’s acquisition of Crown Windley in 2002, to complement their metrology machine business.
Crown themselves were founded in 1904 and were a renowned world leader in the metrology field of
granite and cast iron surface plates
and tables.
Crown Windley Granite - all of our
high-quality surface tables
are supplied with a UKAS Certificate of Calibration after being hand-lapped by our team of skilled engineers to grade 0,1 or 2.
Crown Windley Metrology Tooling - Products in our
metrology tooling
range from Magnetic V-Blocks, Magnetic
Sine Tables
and Adjustable Angle Plates through to Tool Makers Vices, Sine Vices and Cast Iron Box Angle Plates.
2001
Eley Metrology's Unique Development of the Latest
Long-Bore Measurement (LBM)
CNC CMM.
The LBM offers a solution to a challenging branch of metrology: the precision measurement of features down long, deep bores. Applications include aerospace components such as main engine shafts, hydraulically operated under-carriage landing gear, nuclear reactor items, oil industry components and line-bored bearing housings.
2013
Eley introducing the latest range of patented
Vertex VMS digital height gauge
in 2013 which is the most advanced dig
